inputs.label: Integer to Partition
inputs.businessContext: Positive integer n (n ≥ 1) for which the number of integer partitions is approximated. Used in combinatorics, inventory partitioning, and resource distribution modeling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Positive integer n (n ≥ 1) for which the number of integer partitions is approximated. Used in combinatorics, inventory partitioning, and resource distribution modeling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pozitif tam sayı n (n ≥ 1) için tamsayı bölümlerinin sayısı yaklaşık olarak hesaplanır. Kombinatorik, envanter bölümleme ve kaynak dağıtım modellemesinde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Positive ganze Zahl n (n ≥ 1), für die die Anzahl der ganzzahligen Partitionen approximiert wird. Verwendet in Kombinatorik, Bestandspartitionierung und Ressourcenverteilungsmodellierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entier positif n (n ≥ 1) pour lequel le nombre de partitions entières est approximé. Utilisé en combinatoire, partitionnement d'inventaire et modélisation de distribution de ressources.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entero positivo n (n ≥ 1) para el cual se aproxima el número de particiones enteras. Se usa en combinatoria, partición de inventarios y modelado de distribución de recursos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد صحيح موجب n (n ≥ 1) يتم تقريب عدد تقسيماته الصحيحة. يُستخدم في التوافقيات، وتقسيم المخزون، ونمذجة توزيع الموارد.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
